label: Tomorrow.io
description: Access hyperlocal weather forecasts and climate intelligence data via the Tomorrow.io API.

form.title: Connect Tomorrow.io
form.subtitle: Paste your Tomorrow.io API key to start pulling hyperlocal weather and climate data.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Tomorrow.io API key — the fastest way to connect. Found in app.tomorrow.io under Settings → Development → API Keys.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with a Tomorrow.io API Key

1. Log in to your Tomorrow.io account at [app.tomorrow.io](https://app.tomorrow.io).
2. Click your profile icon or go to **Settings** in the left sidebar.
3. Navigate to **Development → API Keys** (or just **API Keys** depending on your plan).
4. Click **Generate Key** or copy an existing key.
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- Free-tier keys have rate limits (e.g. 25 calls/hour, 500 calls/day). Check your plan for exact limits.
- Keep your key secret — anyone with it can consume your quota.
- If you need to rotate your key, generate a new one in the same settings panel and update it here.
- See [Tomorrow.io API docs](https://docs.tomorrow.io/reference/api-authentication) for full authentication details.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at app.tomorrow.io → Settings → Development → API Keys.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Override only if Tomorrow.io has issued you a custom endpoint. Leave as default for standard accounts.
